args.message: Can you explain what 'tip-top' maintenance specifically entails? What exact parts or systems were checked or serviced during the last major service?

text: Can you explain what 'tip-top' maintenance specifically entails? What exact parts or systems were checked or serviced during the last major service?

speaker: seller

args.message: When I say 'tip-top,' I mean the works! For a fleet car like this was, they're very diligent. We're talking oil changes, checking all the fluid levels – brake, power steering, coolant – tire rotations, making sure the brakes are in good shape, and a general inspection of the belts and hoses. Basically, everything you'd expect to keep a reliable car running smoothly. It's a very solid vehicle, dependable vehicle.
